# pyDeprecate

> Simple tooling for marking deprecated functions or classes and re-routing to their successors. Zero dependencies. Python 3.9+. Apache 2.0.

## Docs

- [Home](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/index.html): Project overview, features, and comparison with other deprecation tools
- [Getting Started](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/getting-started.html): Installation, quick start, and API overview
- [Use Cases](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/guide/use-cases.html): 11 real-world deprecation patterns with worked examples
- [void() Helper](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/guide/void-helper.html): How and when to use the void() sentinel function
- [Audit Tools](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/guide/audit.html): CI/CD enforcement of removal deadlines and deprecation chain detection
- [Troubleshooting](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/troubleshooting.html): Common errors and their fixes

## Resources

- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/pyDeprecate/): Package installation and release history
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Borda/pyDeprecate): Source code and issue tracker
- [Changelog](https://github.com/Borda/pyDeprecate/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release notes

## Optional

- [Contributing](https://github.com/Borda/pyDeprecate/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution guide
- [Security](https://github.com/Borda/pyDeprecate/blob/main/.github/SECURITY.md): Security policy
- [Sphinx Demo](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/demo-sphinx/index.html): Docstring auto-injection rendered via Sphinx
- [MkDocs Demo](https://borda.github.io/pyDeprecate/demo-mkdocs/index.html): Docstring auto-injection rendered via MkDocs
